# GFM features

Exercises GitHub-flavored markdown extensions: tables, task lists,
autolinks, and GitHub alerts. mdp's goldmark setup enables all four.

## Table

| Format | Kind   | Notes                       |
| ------ | ------ | --------------------------- |
| docx   | binary | Office Open XML, zip-packed |
| rst    | text   | reStructuredText            |
| typst  | text   | newer pandoc only           |

## Task list

- [x] Implement format dispatch
- [x] Daily pandoc-bump workflow
- [ ] Switch on the lights

Visit https://example.com to learn more.
